name: Lake Winnibigoshish
intro_text: Locally known as "Big Winnie," Lake Winnibigoshish is the fourth-largest lake entirely within Minnesota — 67,000 acres of open water in the heart of the Chippewa National Forest. Famous for walleye, undeveloped shoreline, and a culture of cabins-not-castles.
seo_title: Lake Winnibigoshish Homes for Sale | Cass County, MN Lakefront Real Estate
seo_description: Lake Winnibigoshish ("Big Winnie") cabins and lake homes — 67,000 acres of walleye water in the Chippewa National Forest, near Bena and Deer River, MN.

name: Rainy Lake
intro_text: Straddling the Minnesota–Ontario border at International Falls, Rainy Lake is the doorstep to Voyageurs National Park — 360 miles of shoreline, more than 500 islands, and walleye fishing that drew the original voyageurs through. Owning here means accepting wilderness as a feature, not a flaw.
seo_title: Rainy Lake Homes for Sale | Voyageurs National Park, MN
seo_description: Rainy Lake cabins and lake homes on the Minnesota–Ontario border. 360 miles of shoreline, 500+ islands, and the gateway to Voyageurs National Park.

name: Kabetogama Lake
intro_text: Lake Kabetogama is one of the four big Voyageurs National Park lakes — 25,000 acres of clear water, granite islands, and old-growth boreal forest. The resort road along its south shore is one of Minnesota's quietest summer corridors.
seo_title: Kabetogama Lake Homes for Sale | Voyageurs National Park, MN
seo_description: Kabetogama Lake cabins and lakefront homes — 25,000 acres inside Voyageurs National Park, walleye + smallmouth fishing, granite-island shorelines.

name: Lake Pepin
intro_text: A 22-mile natural widening of the Mississippi River south of Red Wing, Lake Pepin is the birthplace of waterskiing and the prettiest stretch of bluff-country lakefront in Minnesota. Lake City, Frontenac, and Stockholm anchor a string of historic river towns along its shore.
seo_title: Lake Pepin Homes for Sale | Lake City, Wabasha, MN Bluff Country Real Estate
seo_description: Lake Pepin lake homes — 22 miles of Mississippi River bluff country between Red Wing and Wabasha. Lake City, Frontenac, Stockholm waterfront.

name: Big Stone Lake
intro_text: Big Stone Lake is Minnesota's westernmost big water — a 26-mile glacial lake forming the South Dakota border, with quiet prairie shoreline and a serious walleye fishery. Ortonville is the gateway town; the lake itself is the source of the Minnesota River.
seo_title: Big Stone Lake Homes for Sale | Ortonville, MN Lakefront Real Estate
seo_description: Big Stone Lake cabins and lake homes on the Minnesota–South Dakota border. 26 miles of prairie lakefront, walleye fishing, gateway to the Minnesota River.

name: Otter Tail Lake
intro_text: Otter Tail Lake is the second-largest lake in Otter Tail County — 13,700 acres with a long sandy bottom and a generational cabin culture stretching back to the 1920s. Battle Lake village sits on its north shore.
seo_title: Otter Tail Lake Homes for Sale | Battle Lake, MN Lakes Country Real Estate
seo_description: Otter Tail Lake lake homes and cabins — 13,700 acres of central Minnesota lakefront in Otter Tail County. Sandy bottom, classic Lakes Country.

name: Lake Bemidji
intro_text: Lake Bemidji wraps directly around the city of Bemidji — the rare big northern lake where you can walk to dinner downtown after pulling the boat. Source of the Mississippi River drainage, and Paul Bunyan country.
seo_title: Lake Bemidji Homes for Sale | Bemidji, MN Lakefront Real Estate
seo_description: Lake Bemidji lake homes — 6,400 acres of waterfront wrapping the city of Bemidji, MN. Paul Bunyan country, walkable downtown, the headwaters of the Mississippi nearby.

name: Whitefish Chain of Lakes
intro_text: The Whitefish Chain links 14 connected lakes north of Brainerd into one of Minnesota's most coveted addresses — clear water, deep coves, and properties that almost never come to market quietly. Crosslake anchors the chain.
seo_title: Whitefish Chain Homes for Sale | Crosslake, Pequot Lakes MN Real Estate
seo_description: Whitefish Chain of Lakes homes — 14 connected lakes north of Brainerd, MN. Crosslake, Pequot Lakes, and Pine River waterfront real estate.

name: Pokegama Lake
intro_text: Pokegama Lake at Grand Rapids is a deep, clear, 6,600-acre lake with five distinct bays and a reputation for the largest muskies in the region. The Mississippi River runs straight through it.
seo_title: Pokegama Lake Homes for Sale | Grand Rapids, MN Lakefront Real Estate
seo_description: Pokegama Lake cabins and lake homes near Grand Rapids, MN. 6,600 acres of deep, clear water on the Mississippi River — muskie and walleye country.

name: Lake Lida
intro_text: Lake Lida is a 5,700-acre clear-water lake with a deep main bay and dozens of small islands — one of the quieter prizes of the Lakes Country between Pelican Rapids and Detroit Lakes. Mostly old families, not turnover.
seo_title: Lake Lida Homes for Sale | Pelican Rapids, MN Lakefront Real Estate
seo_description: Lake Lida lake homes and cabins between Pelican Rapids and Detroit Lakes, MN. 5,700 acres of clear-water Lakes Country lakefront.

name: Lake Carlos
intro_text: Lake Carlos crowns the Alexandria chain — 2,600 acres of clear, deep water just north of Alexandria, anchored by Lake Carlos State Park. A long-tenured cabin community with serious sailboating and trout fishing.
seo_title: Lake Carlos Homes for Sale | Alexandria, MN Lakefront Real Estate
seo_description: Lake Carlos lake homes north of Alexandria, MN. 2,600 acres of clear, deep water with Lake Carlos State Park, sailing, and trout fishing.

name: Lake Osakis
intro_text: Lake Osakis is a 6,300-acre prairie-edge lake at the geographic gateway to Lakes Country — Minnesota's most underrated walleye lake by surface area, with a flat-bottom layout and miles of accessible shoreline. The town of Osakis sits on its south end.
seo_title: Lake Osakis Homes for Sale | Osakis, MN Lakefront Real Estate
seo_description: Lake Osakis lake homes — 6,300 acres of walleye water at the gateway to Minnesota's Lakes Country. Osakis, Alexandria area.

name: Battle Lake
intro_text: West Battle Lake is a 5,500-acre Otter Tail County classic with sand beaches, a thriving summer village in Battle Lake town, and the kind of generational cabin economy that defines the region.
seo_title: Battle Lake Homes for Sale | Battle Lake, MN Otter Tail County Real Estate
seo_description: Battle Lake (West Battle) lake homes — 5,500 acres of Otter Tail County lakefront, sandy beaches, classic Lakes Country village.

name: Big Sandy Lake
intro_text: Big Sandy Lake is one of the historic gateways of the Northwest fur trade — 6,400 acres of water with a long sandy beach on its north end and a quieter resort-and-cabin culture than the Brainerd Chain to its west.
seo_title: Big Sandy Lake Homes for Sale | McGregor, Aitkin County, MN Real Estate
seo_description: Big Sandy Lake cabins and lake homes near McGregor, MN. 6,400 acres of historic Aitkin County lakefront on the Sandy Lake fur-trade route.

name: Forest Lake
intro_text: Forest Lake is the closest serious lake to downtown St. Paul — three connected basins, about 2,250 acres, with a thriving small-city downtown on its north shore. The metro lake people actually buy on.
seo_title: Forest Lake Homes for Sale | Forest Lake, MN Twin Cities Metro Real Estate
seo_description: Forest Lake lake homes 25 minutes north of St. Paul. 2,250 acres of three-basin Twin Cities Metro lakefront with a walkable downtown.

name: Lake Waconia
intro_text: Lake Waconia is the second-largest lake in the Twin Cities metro — 3,100 acres of clear water just 35 minutes from downtown Minneapolis, with a charming Waconia village and a long sailing tradition.
seo_title: Lake Waconia Homes for Sale | Waconia, MN Twin Cities Metro Real Estate
seo_description: Lake Waconia lake homes 35 minutes from downtown Minneapolis. 3,100 acres of Carver County waterfront, sailing, charming downtown Waconia.

name: Prior Lake
intro_text: Prior Lake (Upper + Lower combined) is the largest lake within the seven-county Twin Cities metro core — over 1,400 acres of connected water in a thriving lakefront-suburb economy 25 minutes from downtown Minneapolis.
seo_title: Prior Lake Homes for Sale | Prior Lake, MN Twin Cities Metro Real Estate
seo_description: Prior Lake lake homes 25 minutes from downtown Minneapolis. 1,400+ acres of Upper and Lower Prior Lake in Scott County's premier lakefront suburb.

name: Medicine Lake
intro_text: Medicine Lake is the largest lake entirely within the city of Plymouth — 880 acres of west-metro waterfront 15 minutes from downtown Minneapolis. French Regional Park anchors the east shore.

seo_description: Medicine Lake lake homes in Plymouth, MN. 880 acres of west Twin Cities metro waterfront 15 minutes from downtown Minneapolis. French Regional Park.

name: Bde Maka Ska
intro_text: Bde Maka Ska (formerly Lake Calhoun) is the largest lake in the city of Minneapolis — 401 acres of clear water with a paved 3.1-mile path, the Bde Maka Ska Pavilion, and some of the most coveted urban lakefront addresses in the Midwest.

seo_description: Bde Maka Ska (Lake Calhoun) lake homes in south Minneapolis. 401 acres on the Chain of Lakes, paved 3.1-mile path, Uptown lakefront real estate.

name: Lake Harriet
intro_text: Lake Harriet sits at the south end of the Minneapolis Chain — 353 acres with its iconic bandshell, Rose Garden, and the trolley line that still runs to Lake Calhoun. Quieter than its big sister Bde Maka Ska and just as coveted.
seo_title: Lake Harriet Homes for Sale | Minneapolis Chain of Lakes Real Estate
seo_description: Lake Harriet homes in south Minneapolis. 353 acres on the Chain of Lakes, with the bandshell, Rose Garden, and Linden Hills neighborhood lakefront.

name: Cedar Lake
intro_text: Cedar Lake is the wildest of the Minneapolis Chain — 170 acres of largely undeveloped shoreline on the city's west side, including Hidden Beach. The most secluded urban lake in the Twin Cities.
seo_title: Cedar Lake Homes for Sale | Minneapolis Chain of Lakes Real Estate
seo_description: Cedar Lake homes in west Minneapolis. 170 acres of mostly undeveloped Chain-of-Lakes shoreline, Hidden Beach, Kenwood and Cedar–Isles–Dean.

name: Lake Nokomis
intro_text: Lake Nokomis is south Minneapolis's neighborhood lake — 200 acres with a long beach, paved loop, and the kind of dense lakefront housing stock that south Mpls is built on. Quiet, residential, well-loved.

seo_description: Lake Nokomis homes in south Minneapolis. 200 acres of neighborhood lakefront with a long beach, paved loop, and dense south-Minneapolis residential character.

name: Lake Independence
intro_text: Lake Independence is a 850-acre clear-water lake on the far west edge of Hennepin County — a Twin Cities lake that still feels rural. Baker Park Reserve covers most of its eastern shore.

seo_description: Lake Independence lake homes on the western edge of Hennepin County. 850 acres of clear water near Maple Plain and Medina, Baker Park Reserve adjacent.

name: Lake Phalen
intro_text: Lake Phalen is St. Paul's lake — 215 acres on the east side of the city, anchored by Phalen Regional Park. A walkable, parkside neighborhood lake the rest of the country would treat as a premier address.

name: Lake Sakatah
intro_text: Lake Sakatah is the centerpiece of southern Minnesota's chain — a 970-acre prairie-rim lake with Sakatah Lake State Park on its north shore and a 39-mile rail-trail running from Faribault to Mankato along its length.
